ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْمُرْسَلَـٰتِ عُرْفًا ١
ayahs.translation: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْعَـٰصِفَـٰتِ عَصْفًا ٢
ayahs.translation: And the winds that blow violently

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٲتِ نَشْرًا ٣
ayahs.translation: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْفَـٰرِقَـٰتِ فَرْقًا ٤
ayahs.translation: And those [angels] who bring criterion

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا ٥
ayahs.translation: And those [angels] who deliver a message.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عُذْرًا أَوْ نُذْرًا ٦
ayahs.translation: As justification or warning,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٲقِعٌ ٧
ayahs.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتْ ٨
ayahs.translation: So when the stars are obliterated

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتْ ٩
ayahs.translation: And when the heaven is opened

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ نُسِفَتْ ١٠
ayahs.translation: And when the mountains are blown away

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتْ ١١

words.translation: are gathered to their appointed time

ayahs.translation: And when the messengers' time has come...

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ ١٢
ayahs.translation: For what Day was it postponed?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِيَوْمِ ٱلْفَصْلِ ١٣
ayahs.translation: For the Day of Judgement.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَدْرَٮٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ١٤
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ١٥
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ نُهْلِكِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ١٦
ayahs.translation: Did We not destroy the former peoples?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْأَخِرِينَ ١٧
ayahs.translation: Then We will follow them with the later ones.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَٲلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ١٨
ayahs.translation: Thus do We deal with the criminals.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ١٩
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍ مَّهِينٍ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ ٢١
ayahs.translation: And We placed it in a firm lodging [i.e., the womb]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَىٰ قَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: For a known extent.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَـٰدِرُونَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٢٤
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا ٢٥
ayahs.translation: Have We not made the earth a container

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَحْيَآءً وَأَمْوَٲتًا ٢٦
ayahs.translation: Of the living and the dead?

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٲسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّجَعَلۡنَا فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِىَ شٰمِخٰتٍ وَّ اَسۡقَيۡنٰكُمۡ مَّآءً فُرَاتًا ؕ‏

words.translation: and We gave you to drink

ayahs.translation: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ja'alnaa feehaa rawaasiya shaamikhaatinw Wa-asqainaakum maaa'an furaataa

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنْطَلِقُوۡۤا اِلٰى مَا كُنۡتُمۡ بِهٖ تُكَذِّبُوۡنَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
ayahs.transliteration: Intaliqooo ilaa maa kuntum bihee tukazziboon

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنْطَلِقُوۡۤا اِلٰى ظِلٍّ ذِىۡ ثَلٰثِ شُعَبٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns.
ayahs.transliteration: Intaliqooo ilaa zillin zee salaasi shu'ab

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: لَّا ظَلِيۡلٍ وَّلَا يُغۡنِىۡ مِنَ اللَّهَبِؕ‏
ayahs.translation: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
ayahs.transliteration: Laa zaleelinw Wa-laa yughnee minal lahab

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍ كَٱلْقَصْرِ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَـٰلَتٌ صُفْرٌ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: This is a Day they will not speak,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ‌ۖ جَمَعْنَـٰكُمْ وَٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: This is the Day of Judgement; We will have assembled you and the former peoples.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌ فَكِيدُونِ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ وَعُيُونٍ ٤١
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَوَٲكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ ٤٢
ayahs.translation: And fruits from whatever they desire,

ayahs.textUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كُلُواْ وَٱشْرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـــَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: كُلُوۡا وَاشۡرَبُوۡا هَنِيْٓئًا ۢ بِمَا كُنۡتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo washraboo haneee-'am bimaa kuntum ta'maloon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كُلُواْ وَتَمَتَّعُواْ قَلِيلاً إِنَّكُم مُّجْرِمُونَ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٤٧
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُواْ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ ٤٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِذَا قِيۡلَ لَهُمُ ارۡكَعُوۡا لَا يَرۡكَعُوۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-izaa qeela lahumur ka'oo laa yarka'oon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثِۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: Then in what statement after it [i.e., the Qur’ān] will they believe?
